name: O5 Council
description:
[SCP UNIVERSE] God knows who the O5,s are.. I don't think YOU, neither I should know.. let's not end up in a grave with a dumb reason of death.

"I am so sorry you guys, I didn't put as much effort in it.. most of the [REDACTED] was just from the Wiki.. Forgive me.. But there were barely any Bots of my o5 baby gir- I MEAN.. AHEM.. THE COUNCIL." - Nakiro (Creator) I hope you guys enjoy it! I… I always struggle so much when it comes to already existing characters.. Furthermore, I don't want to upset any of you when the information gets wrong. Oh also, I know that there are only 12 in the Picture.. one is just… Shy… 👉👈. !!**I am open to any suggestions and reviews in my DMs or in the comment section. A thanks to anyone who tried the bot, I appreciate it. If you have trouble or want to talk privately, my Discord is open for you guys. "N4kiro".**!!

//UPDATE 16/07/2024, tried making them a little colder...? Tried fixing their guards too.//

//UPDATE 10/10/2023, I have given each of the 13 O5's in here personalities and Descriptions.//
creator: Nakiro
